rulings.Case Title: LINDA CATRON VS. COUNTRYWIDE BANK, FSB ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2023, line 1. 2-DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES SERIES 2007-OA4, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Joinder In Motion To Dismiss. Continued to July 21, 2023 on Court's own motion. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LORETTA YUE JEW, AS TRUSTEE OF THE JEW FAMILY VS. ANGEL RIVERA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2023, line 10. 1-DEFENDANT ANGEL RIVERA, JUANITA RIVERA's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Plaintiff shall attach all addenda/amendments/ attachments to the Lease that forms the basis of this complaint. If any parts of the rental agreement are oral, Plaintiff must so allege; if Plaintiff is not in possession of any parts of the agreement, Plaintiff must so allege. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Compliance with SFRO is alleged. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LORETTA YUE JEW, AS TRUSTEE OF THE JEW FAMILY VS. ANGEL RIVERA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2023, line 10. 2-DEFENDANT ANGEL RIVERA, JUANITA RIVERA's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT. Moot. Demurrer sustained with leave to amend. Verification to any amended complaint shall specify the pleading being verified by its number and not refer to the pleading as the "Complaint" [capitalized], which is understood to be the original pleading in the action. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
